mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(sh.pay_amount), 0) FROM saving_history sh JOIN saving_account sa ON sh.account_id = sa.account_id WHERE sa.user_id = #{userId} AND sa.del_yn = 'N' AND sh.del_yn = 'N'

SELECT u.name, mr.rank_name, mt.type_name, u.unit_name, u.enlist_date, u.discharge_date FROM `user` u LEFT JOIN military_rank mr ON u.rank_id = mr.rank_id LEFT JOIN military_types mt ON u.type_id = mt.type_id WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND u.del_yn = 'N'
SELECT discharge_date FROM user WHERE id = #{userId} AND del_yn = 'N'
SELECT * FROM saving_account WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND del_yn = 'N'
SELECT * FROM saving_history WHERE account_id = #{accountId} AND del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY pay_round ASC
